title: Buttery Fluffy Mashed Bananas Stir-fry
description: This Venezuelan-inspired dish features sweet sherry and a tandoori flavor profile with a touch of sugar-free sweetness, perfect as a solo dinner option.
instructions: Cut the bananas into small pieces and place them in a bowl.
Add sherry, olive oil, minced garlic, curry powder, and salt. Mix well until all banana pieces are coated evenly.
Transfer the mixture onto an oven-safe plate or baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10 minutes or until the bananas turn golden brown and tender.
Remove from heat and let it cool slightly before stirring gently to combine.
Serve as a light, flavorful side dish or main course.
